purpose: Small connector-friendly evidence file for ChatGPT. Read this before large market_report.json/action_board.json to avoid large JSON connector truncation/empty-content issues.

decision_contract.purpose: Small, stable handoff contract from GitHub evidence to ChatGPT live-market judgment.

roles.github: data quality, reproducible quant evidence, portfolio-model risk scope, and candidate generation
roles.chatgpt: live quote/news/macro/valuation and actual-account risk reconciliation

market_data.source: Tiingo Free API with local CSV cache fallback, tiered refresh, 429 circuit breaker, append-only cache updates

decision.reason: No fresh active signal passed the sample, return, alpha, and MAE filters.

required_live_checks: Read action_board.json, eason_signal.json, portfolio_backtest.json, and market_report.json freshness first.
Check current tradable bid/ask/last from IBKR if available; otherwise cross-check at least two public quote sources.
Check whether current price is still close to the tested signal entry area; do not chase if price already ran far away.
Check same-day regime: SPY/QQQ trend, VIX, 10Y yield, breadth, and semiconductor leadership.
Check fresh news, earnings, guidance, analyst changes, regulation, and macro events for the candidate and key leaders.
Check portfolio constraints: cash floor, offense cash, QQQ/SMH/MSFT concentration, semis max, MSFT max, and same-day repeat-buy rule.
Decide final action: buy/add, wait, pause, trim, sell, or no trade. GitHub evidence alone is never an automatic order.
required_final_inputs: explicit limit price, invalidation level, and cancel condition

market_data.source: Tiingo Free API with local CSV cache fallback, tiered refresh, 429 circuit breaker, append-only cache updates

github_data_quality.usage_rule: Use High/Medium as evidence; Medium-Low only as auxiliary evidence; Low/Unusable cannot justify trades by itself.

final_gate.hard_rule: GitHub evidence can create candidates only. Vectorbt/backtest evidence + ChatGPT live review + IBKR quote + human confirmation are required before any order.

signal_summary.reason: No fresh active signal passed the sample, return, alpha, and MAE filters.

market_data.source: Tiingo Free API with local CSV cache fallback, tiered refresh, 429 circuit breaker, append-only cache updates

refresh_policy.long_tail_weekly: deterministic weekday rotation; no-cache tickers bypass rotation

universe.note: coverage_gaps are tickers without usable cache yet; errors are true processing/fetch failures not classified as rotation/rate-limit coverage gaps.

vectorbt_evidence_summary.execution_assumption: Executable strategy backtests shift entry/exit signals by 1 trading day to avoid same-close look-ahead. Forward evidence remains signal-close outcome measurement.

top_entry_forward_evidence_20d.measurement_assumption: Forward evidence measures close-to-close outcome after the signal day; executable vectorbt strategy uses next-bar shifted signals.
top_entry_forward_evidence_20d.description: Price reclaims the 50-day moving average while above the 200-day average.

top_entry_forward_evidence_20d.description: Above 20/50/200-day averages with positive 20-day momentum and non-overheated RSI.

important_limits: Uses daily adjusted prices from cached docs CSV files; not intraday bid/ask.
Uses model weights, not Eason's private real account shares/cash.
Regime signal is shifted one trading day to avoid same-close signal/fill look-ahead.
Cash return uses SGOV when available; otherwise cash earns 0% before SGOV history.
Portfolio rebalances are model assumptions and may not match actual fills.
Final trading decisions still require ChatGPT live quote/news/macro/portfolio review and human confirmation.

required_live_checks_before_order: IBKR bid/ask/last or two public quote sources
current price vs tested signal area
real account cash, position size, QQQ+SMH+MSFT concentration, semiconductor exposure, MSFT exposure
exact limit price, invalidation level, and cancel condition
